---

## Heading Rules

- `#` = chapter title (only one per file)
- `##` = major heading
- `###` = subsection

## Notation Rules

- Numbers: half-width (100, 2026, 80%)
- Japanese punctuation in prose: full-width (。,、)
- Parentheses in prose: full-width （）
- First term appearance: Japanese (English)
